basics.name: Abdulrahman Ahmad
basics.label: Ph.D. Candidate in Computer Science (AI and Autonomous Vehicles)
basics.summary: Ph.D. candidate at Khalifa University specializing in autonomous driving, intelligent transportation systems, motion planning under uncertainty, online optimization, and data-driven perception.

work.summary: Researcher in the Operations Research Lab and Autonomous Vehicles Lab.
highlights: Worked on autonomous driving, intelligent transportation systems, emergency-vehicle prioritization, and full-stack autonomy development.
Assisted in teaching programming, data science, algorithms, and robotics courses.
Co-advised undergraduate senior design work in autonomous mobile robotics.

work.summary: Research in formal methods for mobile robots, symbolic control, and hybrid systems.
highlights: Assisted in teaching mathematics, control, and programming courses.
Co-advised undergraduate senior design teams on IoT-based projects.

work.summary: Designed and delivered programming and robotics courses for undergraduate students and professionals.
highlights: Taught C, C++, C#, desktop applications, mobile robotics, and Arduino programming.

work.summary: Participated in software engineering and embedded-systems development projects in addition to military duties.
highlights: Contributed to CRM desktop software and equipment-control interfaces.

work.summary: Contributed to embedded systems development and RTOS integration.
highlights: Worked on firmware, technical documentation, and Android application support.

courses: Thesis: Online risk-bounded motion planning for autonomous driving under uncertainty

education.area: M.Sc. in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science
courses: Thesis: Enhancing Internet of Things strategies for autonomous electric vehicles with existing transportation infrastructure and road users

education.area: B.Eng. in Computers and Systems Engineering
courses: Graduation project in industrial Internet-of-Things control of a lab-scale process

references.name: Dr. Majid Khonji
references.reference: Assistant Professor of Computer Science, Khalifa University. Ph.D. advisor.

references.name: Prof. Young-Ji Byon
references.reference: Professor of Civil Engineering, University of Missouri-St. Louis. M.Sc. advisor.

references.name: Prof. Ahmad Mahmoud
references.reference: Chair of Computers and Systems Engineering Department, Minya University.

publications.name: Trajectory Prediction for Autonomous Driving: Progress, Limitations, and Future Directions
publications.summary: Survey article on trajectory prediction for autonomous driving.

publications.name: Multiple Intelligent Control Strategies for Travel-Time Reduction of Connected Emergency Vehicles
publications.publisher: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
publications.summary: Journal article on connected emergency-vehicle prioritization.

publications.name: EMT: A Visual Multi-Task Benchmark Dataset for Autonomous Driving
publications.summary: Benchmark dataset for multi-task autonomous-driving research.

publications.name: Online Risk-Bounded Graph-Based Local Planning for Autonomous Driving with Theoretical Guarantees
publications.summary: Conference paper on online risk-bounded local planning for autonomous driving.

publications.name: Graph-Based Local Planning with Spatiotemporal Risk Assessment for Risk-Bounded and Prediction-Aware Autonomous Driving
publications.summary: Conference paper on risk-bounded planning with spatiotemporal risk assessment.

publications.name: Reinforcement Learning-Based Optimal Control Design for Active Suspension Systems
publications.summary: Conference paper on reinforcement learning for active suspension control.

publications.name: Eco-Driving Framework for Autonomous Vehicles at Signalized Intersections in Mixed-Traffic Environment
publications.summary: Journal article on eco-driving for autonomous vehicles in mixed traffic.

publications.name: A Machine Learning Approach for Detecting Unauthorized Drone Operators
publications.summary: Conference paper on machine-learning-based drone operator detection.

publications.name: Hybrid Controller for a Software-Defined Architecture of Industrial Internet Lab-Scale Process
publications.summary: Conference paper on software-defined industrial Internet control architecture.
